user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the travel management module, so that travel features are only available when the organization needs them.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I answer "Do you want to enable travel management module?" with Yes or No; Then the module is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save my travel management setup selection, so that the configuration persists.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected Yes or No on the Setup screen; When I click Save; Then my selection is stored

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and proceed to the next step, so that I can continue configuring travel management in sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made my setup selection; When I click Save & Next; Then the selection is saved and I move to the next configuration screen

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel the setup, so that I can exit without applying changes.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then no changes are applied and I leave the setup
